title: TEEN GROUP - 211info
text: LIVING UNDONE TEEN GROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a safe place for teenagers to come and deal with various issues related to grief. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Ages 11-17. Participants must commit to four weeks of the program. Some age exceptions are permitted depending on the maturity of the child. Hours: Wednesday 3pm-4pm Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 223-9955 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: $25 per week DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Bereaved Parent Support Groups * Adolescents Bereavement and Grief Counseling * Adolescents General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF JOURNEY EXTENDED PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF TRAVELERS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INDIVIDUAL GRIEF COUNSELING SESSIONS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OPEN COMMUNITY CIRCLES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIVING UNDONE
